files.purpose: Stable identity and environment profile for the project.
files.notes: Canonical memory file for project identity.

files.purpose: Current truth about active phase, priorities, risks, and next steps.
files.notes: Read first in future sessions after project_profile.json.

files.purpose: Project-level durable task tracker across sessions.
files.notes: Tracks active, backlog, and completed workstreams.

files.purpose: Home page route and highest-visibility public narrative.
files.notes: Often changes during visual polish and narrative updates.

files.purpose: Capital Partners page with investor-facing RAS and business-plan content.
files.notes: Key route for future investor funnel work.

files.purpose: Home-page hero visual composition and supporting RAS cards.
files.notes: Sensitive to cramped layout; current version uses a full-width media block, thesis cards, and stacked operating rows to preserve hierarchy.

files.purpose: Segmented CTA card band used on the home page.
Reusable process-step card grid for operational model sections.
files.notes: Avoid forcing too many columns at constrained widths.

files.purpose: Centralized navigation and marketing copy source for the site.
files.notes: Primary content registry for route copy and card content.

files.purpose: Shared visual system and reusable CSS utilities for the marketing shell, including form controls.
files.notes: Form controls now use a near-white field with dark text and readable select option styling to avoid contrast issues on the dark shell.

files.purpose: Client-side lead form UI, field state, submit handling, and visible success/error feedback.
files.notes: Now surfaces clearer success messaging and recognizes duplicate=true responses so identical retries do not look like failures.

files.purpose: Server-side API endpoint for lead submission validation and insert handling.
files.notes: Uses service-role Supabase access on the server, detects identical rapid retries, triggers both internal and submitter-facing emails after successful inserts, and appends delivery audit notes into inbound_leads.notes.

files.purpose: Server-side SMTP notification helper for lead submissions.
files.notes: Uses Yahoo SMTP for both internal lead notifications and submitter confirmation emails, and omits external replyTo headers because production verification showed that fixes Yahoo delivery for this mailbox setup.

files.purpose: Source-of-truth SQL for the inbound_leads table and related indexes/trigger.
files.notes: Used when setting up or validating Supabase schema.

files.purpose: Site-wide name, description, URL, and OG image settings.
files.notes: SEO and structured-data descriptions depend on this file.

files.purpose: Template environment configuration for local and Vercel setup.
files.notes: Now includes SMTP and lead-notification variables alongside Supabase settings.

files.purpose: Canonical host redirect logic for www to apex handling.
Public deck-derived images used to support the RAS and industry-credibility narrative.
files.notes: Includes shingle, road-roller, and industry-network imagery.
